Interface IExportItemsParameters4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides additional access to members that control parameters to an operation on a mosaic dataset.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("37F01203-2A1D-4406-BB08-F86B95068974")]
public interface IExportItemsParameters4 : IExportItemsParameters3, IExportItemsParameters2, IExportItemsParameters

Properties

BandNames

Input names of extracted bands.

IStringArray BandNames { get; set; }

Property Value

IStringArray
